name: Hot Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl with the eggs and mix well until all components are combined.
3. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly until it thickens. Use a double boiler if available for gentle cooking.
4. This sauce pairs well with ham dishes. It can also be served alongside turkey sandwiches or used as a condiment with leftover dressing.
